name: image_converter
title: Image Converter Tutorial
description: Learn how to convert images to PDF and PDF to images

steps.text:
🖼️ Add Images to Convert

Select image files (PNG, JPG, TIFF, BMP, etc.) to convert to PDF format. Each image becomes a page in the PDF.

📂 Scan Directory for Images

Add all images from a folder at once! This opens a file type selector where you can choose which image formats to scan for.

💡 Perfect for processing entire photo folders!

🎨 Image Preview List

Your selected images appear here. You can:
• Reorder images by dragging
• Remove unwanted images
• Preview image details

🗑️ Remove Selected Files

Select unwanted files in the list and click here to remove them. Use Ctrl+Click or Shift+Click to select multiple files.

🧹 Clear All Files

Need a fresh start? This button removes all files from the list at once. Great for switching between different projects.

📄 Convert Images to PDF

Convert your images to a PDF document. Each image becomes a separate page with optimal formatting and quality preservation.

🖼️ Convert PDF to Images

Convert PDF pages to individual image files. Each page becomes a separate image file in your chosen format (PNG, JPG, etc.).

🔗 Share PDFs with Other Widgets

Got PDF files in your list? This button copies them to the shared file lists in the Split and Merge widgets, so you can easily work with them there too!

💡 Great workflow integration!
